title: Tangy Juicy British Chicken Curry
description: A crowd-pleasing British dish featuring tender chicken in a rich, tangy tamarind curry sauce, perfect for a high-protein dinner. This recipe combines the bold flavors of tamarind pulp with the comfort of a traditional British curry.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tamarind pulp, coconut milk, chicken broth, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to medium-low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in any accumulated juices and adjust seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve over rice or with naan bread.
